package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthrough() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%s\", s)` instead of returning or writing the string directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
